curation_notes: The advisory explicitly identifies sessions.rs as the location of the use-after-free. The patch commit ac30e16 fixes the vulnerability in two functions (attach and diff) in src/session.rs by storing the CString in a variable before calling .as_ptr(), preventing the temporary from being dropped while the pointer is still in use. The same commit also refactors string handling in inner_connection.rs and lib.rs (switching from CString to SmallCString), but the advisory specifically attributes the use-after-free to sessions.rs.
